projectDescription: A full-stack code snippet sharing platform where users can upload, browse, and manage public or private code snippets with built-in authentication.
keyFeatures: Browse randomly ordered public code snippets on the dashboard
Share code snippets with title, type, description, and visibility control
Authenticate users with a combined login/signup flow
View all posts belonging to a specific authenticated user
Infinite scroll with IntersectionObserver for seamless browsing
Spring Boot REST API backend with MySQL persistence
publicApiSurface: GET /api/ — Retrieve a random list of public code snippets
POST /api/upload — Upload a new code snippet (requires authentication)
POST /api/user-posts — Retrieve all snippets for an authenticated user
